subject: Two fantastical sailing vessels navigate enormous magical storm waves under a dramatic sky with a prismatic energy streak
description: Two ships sail through a scene of massive, surging magical waves that swirl with golden and electric-blue energy. In the foreground, a round-hulled vessel with an ornate gold and dark-wood design cuts through the water, partially tipped by the force of the waves. In the upper-right background, a second ship with tall masts and dark sails is visible on a crest. Between them, a prismatic streak of iridescent light — pink, white, and gold — cuts diagonally across the sky from the upper-left toward the horizon. The overall palette is warm amber and gold for the water and light, with a stormy blue-purple sky above. No humanoid figures are visible.
foreground: Round-hulled ornate vessel riding massive golden magical waves
background: Second sailing ship on wave crest; purple-blue stormy sky with prismatic light streak
emotion: awe and precarious excitement; no faces but scale and motion convey peril and wonder
